channel.title: #Hotswap · keyboard wire
channel.description: All keyboard wire entries tagged Hotswap.

item.title: Keychron C3 Pro compatibility with Akko Penguin Silent switches
item.description: Question about compatibility between Keychron C3 Pro and Akko Penguin Silent switches. — 1 pts · 2 comments · r/Keychron

item.title: NuPhy releases WH80 wireless 8K magnetic gaming keyboard
item.description: NuPhy launched the WH80, a wireless gaming keyboard featuring 8K polling rate and Hall-effect magnetic switches. — ✉ Nuphy

item.title: Krteq (Open source)
item.description: New open-source 61-key unibody using Raspberry Pi Pico and QMK/VIA — notable for Gateron LP 3.0 compatibility and hotswap support. — 51 pts · 4 comments · r/olkb
